title: The Adventure of Sally and Pete

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.text: In a bright, beautiful garden, Sally the confident caterpillar loved to explore. Her friend Pete, a spicy pepper, was always by her side.

dialogue.speaker: Sally
dialogue.text: I'm the best explorer ever! Nothing can scare me! (proudly strutting ahead)

dialogue.speaker: Pete
dialogue.text: Oh no, oh no! You'll get eaten by that big spider! (alarmed, pointing)

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.text: But when Sally saw a giant spider, she got stuck and wouldn't move.

dialogue.speaker: Sally
dialogue.text: I'm too scared! What if it eats me? (whimpering)

dialogue.speaker: Pete
dialogue.text: Don't worry, Sally! I've got an idea! (dramatically) I'll just sneeze on the spider!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.text: But Pete's sneeze accidentally blew pollen all over the garden, making everything go haywire.

dialogue.speaker: Sally
dialogue.text: Now the whole garden is a mess! What have you done?! (fuming)

dialogue.speaker: Pete
dialogue.text: Oops... Sorry, Sally! My sneezes can be pretty spicy! (laughing nervously)

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.text: But then Sally had an idea – they could work together to clean up the mess.

dialogue.speaker: Sally
dialogue.text: Okay, okay! Let's do it! We can't let one little spider stop us! (determined)

dialogue.speaker: Pete
dialogue.text: Together we can do anything, even face our fears! (excitedly joining in)

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.text: With teamwork and a bit of bravery, Sally and Pete cleaned up the garden and chased the spider away.

dialogue.speaker: Sally
dialogue.text: Whoa! I'm proud of us! We did it! (proudly hugging Pete)

dialogue.speaker: Pete
dialogue.text: And we learned that being brave doesn't mean you're not scared – it means you face your fears with a friend by your side!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.text: So remember, little explorers, when you feel scared or unsure, find a friend to help you be brave!

story_type: a character who is afraid of something learns to be brave
